name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Buena Park, CA's Swift Title Loans at 8302 La Palma Ave STE 301 provides quick title loans and same-day cash advances.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans in Buena Park operates at 8302 La Palma Ave STE 301, a standalone storefront location easily accessible from central Buena Park. The location is open Monday through Thursday from 9 AM to 5 PM, Friday 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM, giving Buena Park residents multiple opportunities to visit during their preferred hours.

At this Buena Park location, you'll find title loan specialists ready to process applications for quick cash based on your vehicle's equity. The team accepts applications for title loans and cash advances, with competitive rates and transparent terms. Call +1 714-477-7028 to discuss your eligibility or to schedule an appointment.

If you're a Buena Park, CA resident facing unexpected expenses, a title loan lets you keep driving while accessing funds quickly. Bring your vehicle title, valid ID, proof of insurance, and proof of residency. Swift Title Loans focuses on quick approvals and transparent pricing at this location.
address: 8302 La Palma Ave STE 301, Buena Park, CA 90620

company_info.headquarters: 8302 La Palma Ave STE 301, Buena Park, CA 90620

pros: Same-day funding available for applications approved before noon
Explicitly accepts bad credit and past bankruptcies — no minimum credit score barrier stated
Borrowers keep physical possession of their vehicle during the loan term
Wide loan range: $100 to $50,000 covers both small emergencies and larger needs
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm) and Saturday availability (10am–5pm)
256-bit SSL and TLS security on online applications
In-person Memphis location with staff available for hands-on application help
cons: Vehicle title is pledged as collateral — default risks repossession of your car
No APR, interest rate, or fee information disclosed on the website
Single location only — no service outside Memphis, TN
Closed on Sundays, limiting access during weekend emergencies
Several customer reviews contain unusual keyword-stuffed language, raising questions about review authenticity
best_for: Memphis residents who own a paid-off vehicle and need emergency cash quickly
Borrowers with bad credit or past bankruptcies who have been rejected by conventional lenders
People who need same-day funding and have a clear short-term repayment plan
Those needing larger amounts than typical payday lenders offer, backed by vehicle equity
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for Memphis-area consumers who own a vehicle with clear title and need emergency cash that they cannot access through conventional credit channels, including those with bankruptcy history. The critical caveat is that title loans put your vehicle at risk if you default, and the website discloses no APR or cost information — borrowers must request full loan terms in writing before signing anything.
services: In-person branch service in Memphis, TN
Vehicle-collateral loans with continued car possession during repayment
meta_description: Swift Title Loans at 8302 La Palma Ave, Buena Park, CA. Same-day title loans with quick approvals and transparent rates.
